producer.origin: elara-mesh maintainer receipts feed — act 019f4ed7-d779-7bb3-b392-9cdd1e5d6564; assembled from /record/{id}/wire: the signed act record + an epoch seal current at snapshot time (on today's single-zone mesh that is the zone-0 seal; per-act zone resolution lands with multi-zone). Record-to-seal chain binding needs the inclusion leg, which this envelope does not carry — the verifier grades that honestly. Self-declared, like every producer field.
